room.caption: [G3-6G] Descend into heaven's hell.

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sCVDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=1248 newMapY=352 toRoom=rBelmont3_6A
GID_SET(183139, self.id) progCheck=1470 spriteChange=2 image_yscale=10 depth=1000000

//Death's Eye sprite_index=sCV_DeathParts image_speed=0 image_index=2 image_blend=make_color_rgb(100,100,100) type=1
var gameProgCheck; gameProgCheck=string_char_at(global.gameGate3Prog,2) if gameProgCheck="4" image_blend=c_white

//Death's Rib sprite_index=sCV_DeathParts image_speed=0 image_blend=make_color_rgb(100,100,100) type=1
if global.gameProgress>=1450 image_blend=c_white

//Death's Heart sprite_index=sCV_DeathParts image_speed=0 image_index=1 image_blend=make_color_rgb(100,100,100) type=1
var gameProgCheck; gameProgCheck=string_char_at(global.gameGate3Prog,1) if gameProgCheck="4" image_blend=c_white
